3545562922.detail_html:
• Portable Four-Piece Set : This compact four-piece set includes a steak knife, fork, spoon, and chopsticks, making it an ideal travel companion for students and outdoor enthusiasts.






• Gift-worthy Design : With its elegant design, this tableware set makes a great gift for loved ones, showing your thoughtfulness and appreciation.






• Easy to Clean : The stainless steel material not only ensures durability but also makes cleaning a breeze, saving you time and effort.






• Stainless Steel Material : Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, this tableware set ensures durability and longevity, perfect for both home use and outdoor travels.






• Versatile Use : Whether it's for dining at home or enjoying a meal outdoors, this versatile tableware set caters to various occasions, enhancing your dining experience.

product.desc:
• Portable Four-Piece Set : This compact four-piece set includes a steak knife, fork, spoon, and chopsticks, making it an ideal travel companion for students and outdoor enthusiasts.

product.highlights:
• 24-Piece Stainless Steel Flatware Set, Silverware Set For 6,Housewarming Gift Sets with Premium Box, Tableware Cutlery Include 6 Knife/6 Fork/6 Spoon/ 6 Teaspoon with Polished Finish, Dishwasher Safe. Available In Various Colors.
  • About this item
  • 🎁【SILVERWARE SET FOR 6 PERSON】24 piece silverware set includes 6 each: Dinner Spoon(7.95*1.73in), Dinner Fork(7.95*0.9in), Dinner Knife(8.9*0.75in), Teaspoon(5.28*1.26in), packaged in a nice black gift box.
  • 🎁【HIGH-QUALITY SILVERWARE SET】This silverware set for 6 is made of premium stainless steel which ensures your health, sturdy enough for basic daily use, rust resistant and durable for years to come.
  • 🎁【EASY TO CLEAN】Polished stainless steel silverware set is very easy to clean, whether it is hand wash or dishwasher. The flatware set is healthy for your everyday use.
  • 🎁【MODERN SILVERWARE DESIGN】Clean and classy looking, Smooth surface and mirror polish makes these silverware sets always keep shining. Our stainless steel cutlery have a nice weight, not too heavy and not too light, a decent-size handle to grip. Well designed to provide good grip for both adults and big children.
  • 🎁【MULTI-FUNCTION SILVERWARE SET】Nice stainless steel silverware set for 6, Ideal for everyday home use, hotel, restaurant, entertaining, party, buffet, bistro, camping, picnic,and the flatware set for 6 is perfect gift for housewarming, Thanksgiving, Christmas,etc.

13655390268.title: Portable Korean Style Cutlery Set
13655390268.detail_text: Quantity Offer Available in sets of two, this offer allows you to stock up and save, ensuring you always have extras on hand for guests or emergencies. Complete Set This four-piece set includes a knife, fork, spoon, and chopsticks, providing you with all the necessary dining tools in one convenient package. Portable Design The set's portable design makes it ideal for picnics, camping, or travel, ensuring you always have your essential dining tools at hand. Stainless Steel Material Crafted from durable 304 stainless steel, this set ensures longevity and resistance to rust, making it perfect for both home and outdoor use. Korean Style Featuring a stylish Korean design, this set adds a touch of elegance to your dining experience, whether at home or on the go.

product.desc:
Quantity Offer



Available in sets of two, this offer allows you to stock up and save, ensuring you always have extras on hand for guests or emergencies.






Complete Set



This four-piece set includes a knife, fork, spoon, and chopsticks, providing you with all the necessary dining tools in one convenient package.






Portable Design



The set's portable design makes it ideal for picnics, camping, or travel, ensuring you always have your essential dining tools at hand.






Stainless Steel Material



Crafted from durable 304 stainless steel, this set ensures longevity and resistance to rust, making it perfect for both home and outdoor use.






Korean Style



Featuring a stylish Korean design, this set adds a touch of elegance to your dining experience, whether at home or on the go.

828122631.title: SG SELLERCustomised Wheat Straw 3-pc Cutlery
828122631.detail_text: Specifications SKU828122631_SGAMZ-2786558641Number Of Pieces3 PiecesMaterialWheat StrawCutlery TypeCutlery Sets What’s in the box Holder, Fork, Spoon, Chopsticks Highlights Our reusable wheat straw cutlery sets are made from by-product of wheat production. After grain is harvested, the left over stems are given a new lease of life. This reusable wheat straw cutlery set is the perfect eco gift for both children and adults. Each reusable cutlery set contains a wheat fibre fork, spoon and a pair of chopsticks. The food-grade cutlery is stored in a lightweight sealable wheat straw container. The beautifully coloured cutlery sets takes up minimal space in your bag, so it easily fits into your everyday life. Ideal for picnics, travelling & packed lunches! product.desc:
Premium Continental Wooden Dinnerware Cutlery Set

*READY STOCK! Item will be shipping out from Singapore in 1 to 2 working days.

Set A: 2 x Dining Forks, 2 x Dinning Spoons

Set B: 2 x Dining Forks, 2 x Dining Spoons, 2 x Dining Knife

Set C: 4 x Dining Forks, 4 x Dining Spoons

Set D: 4 x Dining Forks, 4 x Dining Spoons, 4 x Dining Dining Knife

Set E: 2 x Tea Forks, 2 x Tea Spoons

DIMENSION

- Dining Spoon: 20cm x 4.5cm

- Dining Fork: 21cm x 2.7cm

- Dining Knife: 22cm x 1.5cm

- Tea Fork: 14.5cm x 1.7cm

- Tea Spoon: 14.3cm x 3cm

SOLID & DURABLE

Sturdy and will not bend or damaged for heavy use.

QUALITY MATERIAL

Made of high-quality stainless steel with non-toxic materials. Nickel free and rust-proof. Dishwasher safe and great for daily use .

CLASSIC DESIGN

With simple wood accents and monotone colours this set reflects modern minimalist trends ideally.

Fork and Spoon Set Adult Stainless Steel: Wood flatware set, perfect for home, restaurant, bar, cafe, hotel, etc. Fork and Spoon Set with Holder: Perfect for everyday home use or for wedding, christmas, thanksgiving, father, etc. Silicone Sphere Ice Cube Mold: Allows you to release more easily with the sphere in the refrigerator, oven or freezer. 13724027476.title: Black+Blum Stainless Steel Cutlery Set
13724027476.detail_text: Black+Blum Stainless Steel Cutlery Set A reusable stainless steel cutlery set with a compact carry case, ideal for packed lunches, office meals, school, travel, picnics, and takeaway food. The set includes a stacking knife, fork, and spoon that nest neatly inside a hygienic case. Made from high-quality 304/18-8 stainless steel, the cutlery is strong, lightweight, and more effective than disposable plastic or bamboo alternatives. A simple upgrade for anyone building a reusable lunch kit. Key Features: • Includes knife, fork, and spoon • Made from durable 304/18-8 stainless steel • Compact nesting design • Hygienic carry case snaps shut • Tough but lightweight for everyday carrying • Dishwasher-safe cutlery • Great for lunch boxes, office meals, school, camping, travel, and takeaways Materials: 304/18-8 stainless steel, polypropylene Size: L5 x W20 x H2 cm Care: Cutlery is dishwasher-safe. Handwash case when needed. [reusable utensils, travel flatware, portable silverware, lunch utensils, camping cutlery, picnic cutlery, metal utensils, utensil case, zero waste cutlery, office cutlery kit, fork spoon knife set, eco travel utensils]

Its compact design helps keep utensils organized and clean, appealing to parents looking for practical dining solutions.

3060576762.detail_text: Description: Material: Stainless Steel Polishing Process: Cloth Wheel Polishing (mirror Polishing) Color: Contrast Color Box Style Type: Simple Style Features: 1. Portable Stainless Steel Tableware, Thickened Material For A Comfortable Grip 2. Mirror Polishing Design, Multiple Layers Of Technology, Repeated Polishing, The Surface Is As Bright As A Mirror 3. The Edge Of The Tableware Is Smooth And Fine Without Burrs 4. Smooth Lines, Seamless And Easy To Clean 5. Thickened One-piece Molding, Wear-resistant And Durable Package Included: 1 Set* (1 Box, 1 Pair Of Chopsticks, 1 Spoon) Or 1 Set* (1 Box, 1 Pair Of Chopsticks, 1 Spoon, 1 Fork)

Polishing Process: Cloth Wheel Polishing (mirror Polishing)

3. The Edge Of The Tableware Is Smooth And Fine Without Burrs

4. Smooth Lines, Seamless And Easy To Clean

5. Thickened One-piece Molding, Wear-resistant And Durable

Package Included:

1 Set* (1 Box, 1 Pair Of Chopsticks, 1 Spoon)

Or

1 Set* (1 Box, 1 Pair Of Chopsticks, 1 Spoon, 1 Fork)

product.desc:
Description:

Material: Stainless Steel

Polishing Process: Cloth Wheel Polishing (mirror Polishing)

Color: Contrast Color Box

Style Type: Simple Style

Features:

1. Portable Stainless Steel Tableware, Thickened Material For A Comfortable Grip

2. Mirror Polishing Design, Multiple Layers Of Technology, Repeated Polishing, The Surface Is As Bright As A Mirror

3. The Edge Of The Tableware Is Smooth And Fine Without Burrs

4. Smooth Lines, Seamless And Easy To Clean

5. Thickened One-piece Molding, Wear-resistant And Durable

Package Included:

1 Set* (1 Box, 1 Pair Of Chopsticks, 1 Spoon)

Or

1 Set* (1 Box, 1 Pair Of Chopsticks, 1 Spoon, 1 Fork)
product.highlights:
• Material: Stainless Steel
  • Polishing Process: Cloth Wheel Polishing (mirror Polishing)
  • Color: Contrast Color Box
  • Style Type: Simple Style
  • Features:
  • 1. Portable Stainless Steel Tableware, Thickened Material For A Comfortable Grip
  • 2. Mirror Polishing Design, Multiple Layers Of Technology, Repeated Polishing, The Surface Is As Bright As A Mirror
  • 3. The Edge Of The Tableware Is Smooth And Fine Without Burrs
  • 4. Smooth Lines, Seamless And Easy To Clean
  • 5. Thickened One-piece Molding, Wear-resistant And Durable

page_json.name: ROMAHOME 304 Stainless Steel Portable Cutlery Fork Chopsticks Spoon Set Gift Durable and Not Easily Damaged Outdoor Student Cutlery Three-piece Set
page_json.description: Durable 304 Stainless Steel Cutlery Set for outdoor dining, featuring a portable fork, chopsticks, and spoon. Smooth mirror-polished design with a comfortable grip, perfect for students and travelers seeking lightweight, easy-to-clean tableware. - Lazada

1662238728.title: 24-Piece Cutlery Flatware Tableware Set - Stainless Steel Include Knife/Fork/Spoon/Teaspoon with Polished Finish, Reusable and Dishwasher Safe
1662238728.detail_text: Made of 410 Stainless Steel 24 piece set: This flatware set includes 6 dinner knives, 6 forks, 6 spoons, and 6 teaspoons, making it perfect for a dinner party of 6 people. Premium stainless steel: The flatware is made from high-quality, premium stainless steel that is durable, rust-resistant, and dishwasher safe. Modern design: The sleek and modern design of the flatware is sure to impress your guests and add a touch of sophistication to your table setting. Comfortable grip: The flatware features ergonomically designed handles that provide a comfortable grip, making it easy to eat your meal. Easy to clean: The stainless steel construction of the flatware makes it easy to clean, and it is dishwasher safe for added convenience. Perfect for special occasions: This 24 piece premium stainless steel flatware set is perfect for special occasions, such as dinner parties, holidays, and more. Whether you're hosting a formal dinner or a casual gathering, this flatware set is sure to impress your guests. Size : Tea Spoon - Length 14cm x Width 3.2cm / Spoon - Length 20.5cm x Width 4.5cm / Dinner Knife - Length 23cm x Width 2.3cm / Fork - Length 20.5cm x Width 2.5cm

Silicone Sphere Ice Cube Mold: U00a0the product is made of food grade silicone, you can easily release the sponge in the refrigerator. The silicone sponge makes it very easy to clean and use. You can use it to make other utensils in the kitchen. Butter Spreader Knife: The butter spreader knife is easy to use, you can get a razor-sharp rinse with a smooth edge that will not scratch your table. Portable Utensils Set: Whether you're going to a picnic, a bbq, or a family dinner, this stainless steel flatware set is the perfect size to fit in your backpack, bring it with you wherever you go. 3647937231.detail_text: Durable Stainless Steel Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, these utensils are designed to withstand regular use while maintaining their shine. Eco-Friendly Made from stainless steel, these utensils are a sustainable alternative to disposable plasticware. Portable Design This compact set is perfect for on-the-go dining, making it an ideal choice for students or anyone who values convenience. Versatile Use Whether you're enjoying a solo meal or need a set for a small gathering, this three-piece set has you covered. Adorable Storage Box Comes with a cute storage box, ensuring your utensils stay organized and protected when not in use.

💖💖👋 Welcome👋💖💖

We are a local Store based in Singapore.

All our products are ready stock, so you can enjoy fast and hassle-free delivery to your doorstep 📦💨

"Follow our store to enjoy exclusive in-store deals. Thank you for your support!"❣️

📍Products Measurements📍

📏 Kindly note:

Sizes are measured manually, so please allow for slight differences from the actual product. Thank you for your understanding! 😊

-- -- About Your Delivery -- --

🚚 Once your order is successfully placed, all ready-stock items will be shipped within 24 hours

🚚 Delivery Time: 2 - 3 Working Days

🚚 Tracking is available

[SG STOCK] Stainless Steel Spoon Fork Chopstick Set – Durable, Premium Tableware for Home, Kitchen & Dining

Upgrade your dining experience with our premium stainless steel spoon, fork, and chopstick set — perfect for home, kitchen, and professional dining. Designed for durability, hygiene, and style, this complete tableware set ensures you enjoy every meal with convenience and elegance. Ideal for families, couples, or anyone who loves quality cutlery for daily meals or special occasions.

Key Features & Benefits:

Premium Stainless Steel Material – Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, this spoon, fork, and chopstick set is rust-resistant, durable, and safe for daily use. Perfect for home kitchens, restaurants, and professional chefs.

Complete Tableware Set – Includes spoons, forks, and chopsticks for a full dining experience. Ideal for breakfast, lunch, dinner, buffets, and family gatherings.

Durable & Long-Lasting – Designed to withstand daily use, dishwasher safe, and easy to clean. Maintains shine and premium quality over time.

Ergonomic & Comfortable Design – Smooth, polished edges for comfortable handling, perfect for adults and children.

Versatile Kitchen Use – Great for rice, noodles, soups, salads, vegetables, meats, seafood, and desserts.

Hygienic & Safe – Non-toxic, corrosion-resistant stainless steel ensures safe contact with food, perfect for family meals.

Stylish & Modern Design – Elegant finish adds a touch of sophistication to your kitchen, dining table, or restaurant setting.

Why Choose This Cutlery Set:

Trusted by Singapore home cooks, families, and dining enthusiasts.

Ideal for home, kitchen, dining, restaurants, cafes, or gifting.

Helps maintain clean, hygienic, and stylish table settings.

Perfect gift for housewarming, weddings, birthdays, or festive occasions.

Combines functionality, durability, and elegance in one premium stainless steel tableware set.

Product Details:

Material: Stainless Steel (Premium Grade, Rust-Resistant)

Finish: Polished & Smooth

Care: Dishwasher Safe / Easy to Clean

Packaging: Eco-Friendly & Secure

product.desc:
💖💖👋 Welcome👋💖💖

We are a local Store based in Singapore.

All our products are ready stock, so you can enjoy fast and hassle-free delivery to your doorstep 📦💨

"Follow our store to enjoy exclusive in-store deals. Thank you for your support!"❣️

📍Products Measurements📍

📏 Kindly note:

Sizes are measured manually, so please allow for slight differences from the actual product. Thank you for your understanding! 😊

-- -- About Your Delivery -- --

🚚 Once your order is successfully placed, all ready-stock items will be shipped within 24 hours

🚚 Delivery Time: 2 - 3 Working Days

🚚 Tracking is available

[SG STOCK] Stainless Steel Spoon Fork Chopstick Set – Durable, Premium Tableware for Home, Kitchen & Dining

Upgrade your dining experience with our premium stainless steel spoon, fork, and chopstick set — perfect for home, kitchen, and professional dining. Designed for durability, hygiene, and style, this complete tableware set ensures you enjoy every meal with convenience and elegance. Ideal for families, couples, or anyone who loves quality cutlery for daily meals or special occasions.

Key Features & Benefits:

Premium Stainless Steel Material – Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, this spoon, fork, and chopstick set is rust-resistant, durable, and safe for daily use. Perfect for home kitchens, restaurants, and professional chefs.

Complete Tableware Set – Includes spoons, forks, and chopsticks for a full dining experience. Ideal for breakfast, lunch, dinner, buffets, and family gatherings.

Durable & Long-Lasting – Designed to withstand daily use, dishwasher safe, and easy to clean. Maintains shine and premium quality over time.

Ergonomic & Comfortable Design – Smooth, polished edges for comfortable handling, perfect for adults and children.

Versatile Kitchen Use – Great for rice, noodles, soups, salads, vegetables, meats, seafood, and desserts.

Hygienic & Safe – Non-toxic, corrosion-resistant stainless steel ensures safe contact with food, perfect for family meals.

Stylish & Modern Design – Elegant finish adds a touch of sophistication to your kitchen, dining table, or restaurant setting.

Why Choose This Cutlery Set:

Trusted by Singapore home cooks, families, and dining enthusiasts.

Ideal for home, kitchen, dining, restaurants, cafes, or gifting.

Helps maintain clean, hygienic, and stylish table settings.

Perfect gift for housewarming, weddings, birthdays, or festive occasions.

Combines functionality, durability, and elegance in one premium stainless steel tableware set.

Product Details:

Material: Stainless Steel (Premium Grade, Rust-Resistant)

Finish: Polished & Smooth

Care: Dishwasher Safe / Easy to Clean

Packaging: Eco-Friendly & Secure

This wooden cutlery set is crafted with 100% smooth and natural sustainable sources of Birchwood. It makes a perfect alternative to plastic! Your guests will love these chic, rustic, eco-friendly utensils. ★ Set of 24 piece wood cutlery set ★ Includes 8 Spoons, 8 Forks & 8 Knives ★ Size: approx. 16cm.

page_json.name: SUS304 Thick Stainless Steel Cutlery Tableware Spoon Fork Knife Chopsticks Utensils
page_json.description: Premium 304 Stainless Steel Material. Thick Material. Elegant Design. Practical and aesthetically pleasing. Wear Resistant and Durable. Round Edges. Easy to clean and wash. Integrated Molding. Mirror Polishing. Luxury Level Thickness. Elegant Curve Aesthetic Design. Resist Bacteria Growth, Corrosion-Resistant, Oxidation-Resistant and does not rust. 420 Stainless Steel for Cutting Steak Effortlessly. Flawless Edges. Edge are round and smooth. Smooth Edge Lines. Slender Fork Tines Finely Polished. Delicate graceful curves, easy to pick up. Delicate round and glossy like a mirror. Spoon head has moderate thickness. Smooth delicate in the mouth feeling. Thick but not bulky, comfortable to hold. Not easy to deform. Durable and lasting. Redefining a new trend in dining. Giving you a refreshing visual enjoyment. SUS304 Table Spoon 21.1 x 4cm, Weight 65.9g. SUS304 Table Fork 21.3 x 2.6cm, Weight 58g. SUS304 Soup Spoon 20.3 x 4.6cm, Weight 64.6g. SUS304 Tea Spoon 16.1 x 2.9cm, Weight 34.8g. SUS

3533553691.detail_html:
• Easy Storage : The compact design and included storage box make it easy to store and organize your tableware, saving space in your kitchen or luggage.






• Versatile Use : Whether you're at home, in the office, or traveling, this set is versatile enough to meet all your dining needs.






• High-value Tableware : Made from durable stainless steel, this tableware set offers high value for its price, ensuring longevity and reliability.






• Portable Design : This three-piece set of stainless steel spoon, fork, and chopsticks is designed for portability, making it perfect for students or anyone on the go.






• Customizable Logo : The set comes with a storage box that allows for the printing of a customizable logo, adding a personal touch to your dining experience.

detail_blocks.text: • Easy Storage : The compact design and included storage box make it easy to store and organize your tableware, saving space in your kitchen or luggage. • Versatile Use : Whether you're at home, in the office, or traveling, this set is versatile enough to meet all your dining needs. • High-value Tableware : Made from durable stainless steel, this tableware set offers high value for its price, ensuring longevity and reliability. • Portable Design : This three-piece set of stainless steel spoon, fork, and chopsticks is designed for portability, making it perfect for students or anyone on the go. • Customizable Logo : The set comes with a storage box that allows for the printing of a customizable logo, adding a personal touch to your dining experience.

aiTexts: This portable cutlery set includes a stainless steel spoon, fork, and chopsticks, ideal for students and travelers.
Its compact storage box simplifies organization and saves space in kitchens or luggage.
Crafted from durable stainless steel, it ensures long-lasting use and reliability.
Designed for versatile dining, it suits home, office, or outdoor meals.
The storage box can be customized with a logo, offering a personalized touch.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
• Easy Storage : The compact design and included storage box make it easy to store and organize your tableware, saving space in your kitchen or luggage.






• Versatile Use : Whether you're at home, in the office, or traveling, this set is versatile enough to meet all your dining needs.






• High-value Tableware : Made from durable stainless steel, this tableware set offers high value for its price, ensuring longevity and reliability.






• Portable Design : This three-piece set of stainless steel spoon, fork, and chopsticks is designed for portability, making it perfect for students or anyone on the go.






• Customizable Logo : The set comes with a storage box that allows for the printing of a customizable logo, adding a personal touch to your dining experience.
product.title: Stainless Steel Spoon Fork Chopsticks Three-Piece Set Portable Cutlery Student High Aesthetic Storage Box Logo Printable
